name: Avcorp Industries Inc.
description: Avcorp Industries Inc. designs, manufactures, and integrates major structural components for aircraft. The company specializes in composite and metallic aerostructures, serving major commercial and defense aerospace manufacturers worldwide. With facilities in Canada and the United States, Avcorp provides structural assemblies, structural components, and integration services for a wide range of aircraft platforms, including commercial jets, business jets, and military aircraft.
